title: libpod/containers/create，The api interface does not provide the host network mode for specifying the creation container
body: I tried to use the podman api to create the container and specify its network mode as host, but could not find the api reference for details on how to do this? Is there any other way? Or am I missing something?

comments.body:
you need to set the netns nsmode to "host":
```
...
"netns": {"nsmode":"host"}
...
```
API reference: https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/containers/operation/ContainerCreateLibpod

thanks
